cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking what the Indians believed according to the letter they wrote refusing the offer to send their boys to William and Mary College. The options are A, B, C, D. First, I need to recall the content of the letter. The letter says that the officials from Maryland and Virginia wanted the Six Nations Indians to send their boys to the college. The Indians declined, explaining that they know the officials mean well, but they have different ways
